innateAbility.name: Horsepower
innateAbility.description: Grants flat bonus movement speed per current strength and increases the self max movement speed cap.

abilities.name: Hoof Stomp
abilities.description: After a brief windup, Centaur slams the ground, stunning and damaging nearby enemy units.Centaur can move and is not disarmed during the delay.

abilities.name: Double Edge
abilities.description: Strikes a mighty blow at melee range, damaging both himself and a small area around the target. Deals extra damage based on Centaur's strength.

abilities.name: Retaliate
abilities.description: Counters all attacks, and returns a fixed damage amount plus a percentage based on Centaur's strength.

abilities.name: Work Horse
abilities.description: Centaur hitches a cart behind him and can cast Hitch A Ride on an ally.

abilities.name: Hitch A Ride
abilities.description: Centaur tosses an ally into a cart hitched behind him.While in the cart, the ally can still cast and attack normally, but cannot move independently or be targeted by opponents. Non-targeted effects can still affect the hitched ally. Melee heroes has their attack range increased while being hitched.

abilities.name: Stampede
abilities.description: Centaur leads all allied units into a vicious charge, causing them to move through units at max speed while trampling enemy units.
